COMMERCIAL_TCO.rationale: Mid-pack CapEx £21.45m, OpEx £18.2m. Net 45 deviation costs ~£42k/yr in working capital. Clusters A+B only, so weighted to bid scope.

TECH_FIT.rationale: Magnetic-bearing chillers + 2N redundancy is sound. AI setpoint platform still in beta; first GA September 2026 — concrete but not yet proven at Centrica's scale.

TECH_INNOV.rationale: Aurora.IQ promising but unreferencable in production. Immersion-readiness on 2027 roadmap. Solid not stand-out.

SUSTAIN_PUE.rationale: PUE 1.22 design point + 4,680 free-cooling hours, both inside Centrica targets. Make-up water 1.4 L/kWh — meets covenant.

SUSTAIN_CARBON.rationale: SBTi 1.5°C validated, net zero 2040. Lifecycle 6,820 kgCO2e/MW/15yr — solid, not best.

RESILIENCE_SLA.rationale: 84 engineers UK-wide is adequate for Clusters A+B, but the 2-engineer Glasgow team is a concentration risk for Cluster B (Manchester+Glasgow). Spare-parts depth £3.8m UK-held.

IMPLEMENTATION.rationale: Geoff Marriott has run 6 comparable Tier III mobilisations. Hams Hall date confirmed without caveat. PRINCE2 hardened.

SOCIAL_VALUE.rationale: 127 apprentices in 3 years, 35% local sub-contractor commitment. Reading University engineering tie.

RISK_COMPLIANCE.rationale: F-Gas plan credible (R513A → R454B → R290). 2 boilerplate deviations (liability cap 100%, Net 45) — both resolvable in negotiation.

COMMERCIAL_TCO.rationale: Highest CapEx £24.82m (16% above field). Lowest OpEx £16.4m partially offsets. NPV @ 6.5% over 10 years marginally higher than Aurora at the design IT load.

TECH_FIT.rationale: Vector-X chilled-water plant with N+2 chiller redundancy is over-spec versus Centrica's N+1 floor. Tier IV against Tier III+ requirement.

TECH_INNOV.rationale: SmartPath has 41 production EU deployments with 4–7% measured energy savings. Two-phase immersion piloting since 2024.

SUSTAIN_PUE.rationale: PUE 1.19 best-in-field, free cooling 4,920 hrs, water 1.3 L/kWh. Refrigerant R1234ze (GWP 7) already below 2030 cliff.

SUSTAIN_CARBON.rationale: SBTi validated, net zero 2035 (5 years ahead). Lifecycle 5,940 kgCO2e/MW/15yr lowest in field.

RESILIENCE_SLA.rationale: 196 UK engineers across all 5 regions including dedicated Glasgow + Cardiff night-shift teams. 99.4% / 98.1% SLA evidence is best-in-field. £11.2m UK spares pool.

IMPLEMENTATION.rationale: Sarah Mensah PMP, dedicated programme office. Implementation plan exactly mirrors Centrica's go-live calendar with no flagged dependencies.

SOCIAL_VALUE.rationale: 284 apprentices, NEA fuel-poverty partnership (strategically aligned to British Gas customer base). Cluster C (Cardiff) sub-contractor spend lowest at 22%.

RISK_COMPLIANCE.rationale: Boilerplate accepted verbatim (zero deviations). IEC 62443 SL-3 (above Centrica required SL-2). Annual NCC pen-test. Sole risk: rumoured Stulz acquisition (low severity, watch flag).

COMMERCIAL_TCO.rationale: Lowest CapEx £19.98m, but OpEx £19.85m highest — OpEx/CapEx ratio of 0.99 is anomalous for adiabatic plant (typical 0.78–0.85). Net 30 vs Centrica Net 60 is a £58k/yr working capital deviation.

TECH_FIT.rationale: Adiabatic-Plus is genuinely strong on water stewardship — Cardiff-relevant. But N+1 only (matches floor, no headroom) and AI setpoint roadmap-only.

TECH_INNOV.rationale: AI setpoint not deployed anywhere. No immersion roadmap. Innovation case rests on adiabatic engineering pedigree alone.

SUSTAIN_PUE.rationale: PUE 1.24 meets but does not exceed 1.25 ceiling. Free-cooling hours 4,450 above 4,200 floor but lowest in field. Water 1.1 L/kWh is best-in-class — worth weighting for Cluster C.

SUSTAIN_CARBON.rationale: Lifecycle carbon not provided (mandatory in §5). SBTi committed but not validated. Cannot verify trajectory.

RESILIENCE_SLA.rationale: 38 UK engineers — light. Cardiff night-shift sub-contracted to unnamed Welsh partner (TPRM blocker). 96.8% / 92.4% SLA evidence below Centrica required 98%/95%.

IMPLEMENTATION.rationale: Helmut Bauer credible but UK-time only 30%. 12-week chiller lead-time from Stuttgart is a critical-path risk for the Q3 2026 Hams Hall mobilisation.

SOCIAL_VALUE.rationale: 44 apprentices in 3 years — adequate. Local sub-contractor spend reasonable but lower than Helios.

RISK_COMPLIANCE.rationale: 5 contract deviations including liability 100%, F-Gas phase-down 2032 (breaches Centrica 2030 covenant), PI insurance £15m vs required £25m. IEC 62443 only 'in progress'.
